# Cholan Tours - India's Trusted Travel Agency

Explore India and the world with Cholan Tours - a trusted destination management company and tour operator for luxury, customized holiday packages.

## Contact Information
- [+91 431 4226100](https://wa.me/914314226100): Contact number for inquiries and bookings.
- [enquiry@cholantours.com](mailto:enquiry@cholantours.com): Email address for customer inquiries.

## Destinations in India
### Northern India
- [India](https://www.cholantours.com/india): The country offering diverse travel experiences.
- [Chandigarh](https://www.cholantours.com/india/chandigarh-tour-packages): A modern city known for its architecture and gardens.
- [Delhi](https://www.cholantours.com/india/delhi-tour-packages): The capital city, rich in history and culture.
- [Himachal Pradesh](https://www.cholantours.com/india/himachal-pradesh-tour-packages): A northern state known for its scenic mountains.
- [Manali](https://www.cholantours.com/india/manali-tour-packages): A popular hill station in Himachal Pradesh.
- [Shimla](https://www.cholantours.com/india/shimla-tour-packages): The capital of Himachal Pradesh, famous for its colonial architecture.
- [Jammu & Kashmir](https://www.cholantours.com/india/jammu-kashmir-tour-packages): Known for its breathtaking landscapes and cultural heritage.
- [Sonmarg](https://www.cholantours.com/india/sonmarg-tour-packages): A picturesque meadow in Jammu & Kashmir.
- [Srinagar](https://www.cholantours.com/india/srinagar-tour-packages): The summer capital of Jammu & Kashmir, famous for its houseboats.
- [Leh](https://www.cholantours.com/india/leh-tour-packages): A high-altitude desert city in the Himalayas.
- [Pangong Tso](https://www.cholantours.com/india/pangong-tso-tour-packages): A stunning lake located in the Himalayas.
- [Amritsar](https://www.cholantours.com/india/amritsar-tour-packages): Home to the Golden Temple, a significant religious site.
- [Patiala](https://www.cholantours.com/india/patiala-tour-packages): Known for its rich history and culture.
- [Agra](https://www.cholantours.com/india/agra-tour-packages): Famous for the Taj Mahal, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
- [Lucknow](https://www.cholantours.com/india/lucknow-tour-packages): Known for its historical monuments and rich cuisine.

### Northeastern India
- [Uttarakhand](https://www.cholantours.com/india/uttarakhand-tour-packages): A state known for its natural beauty and pilgrimage sites.
- [Nainital](https://www.cholantours.com/india/nainital-tour-packages): A popular hill station known for its lake and scenic views.
- [Arunachal Pradesh](https://www.cholantours.com/india/arunachal-pradesh-tour-packages): A state with diverse cultures and stunning landscapes.
- [Itanagar](https://www.cholantours.com/india/itanagar-tour-packages): The capital city of Arunachal Pradesh.
- [Assam](https://www.cholantours.com/india/assam-tour-packages): Known for its tea gardens and wildlife.
- [Guwahati](https://www.cholantours.com/india/guwahati-tour-packages): The largest city in Assam, a gateway to the Northeast.
- [Bhagalpur](https://www.cholantours.com/india/bhagalpur-tour-packages): Known for its silk and historical significance.
- [Deoghar](https://www.cholantours.com/india/deoghar-tour-packages): A pilgrimage town in Jharkhand.
- [Jamshedpur](https://www.cholantours.com/india/jamshedpur-tour-packages): An industrial city known for its parks and lakes.
- [Ranchi](https://www.cholantours.com/india/ranchi-tour-packages): The capital of Jharkhand, known for its waterfalls.
- [Manipur](https://www.cholantours.com/india/manipur-tour-packages): Known for its rich culture and natural beauty.
- [Meghalaya](https://www.cholantours.com/india/meghalaya-tour-packages): Famous for its living root bridges and waterfalls.
- [Mizoram](https://www.cholantours.com/india/mizoram-tour-packages): Known for its scenic hills and vibrant culture.
- [Nagaland](https://www.cholantours.com/india/nagaland-tour-packages): Known for its tribal culture and festivals.
- [Kohima](https://www.cholantours.com/india/kohima-tour-packages): The capital of Nagaland, known for its historical significance.
- [Odisha](https://www.cholantours.com/india/odisha-tour-packages): Known for its temples and beaches.
- [Sikkim](https://www.cholantours.com/india/sikkim-tour-packages): A state known for its biodiversity and stunning landscapes.
- [Gangtok](https://www.cholantours.com/india/gangtok-tour-packages): The capital of Sikkim, known for its monasteries and views.
- [Tripura](https://www.cholantours.com/india/tripura-tour-packages): Known for its rich history and natural beauty.

### Western India
- [Udaipur](https://www.cholantours.com/india/udaipur-tour-packages): Known as the City of Lakes, famous for its palaces.
- [West Bengal](https://www.cholantours.com/india/west-bengal-tour-packages): A state known for its culture and heritage.
- [Kolkata](https://www.cholantours.com/india/kolkata-tour-packages): The capital of West Bengal, known for its arts and literature.
- [Goa](https://www.cholantours.com/india/goa-tour-packages): Famous for its beaches and vibrant nightlife.
- [Gujarat](https://www.cholantours.com/india/gujarat-tour-packages): Known for its diverse culture and historical sites.
- [Ahmedabad](https://www.cholantours.com/india/ahmedabad-tour-packages): A major city in Gujarat, known for its architecture.

### Southern India
- [Karnataka](https://www.cholantours.com/india/karnataka-tour-packages): Known for its rich history and IT industry.
- [Mangalore](https://www.cholantours.com/india/mangalore-tour-packages): A coastal city known for its beaches and cuisine.
- [Kerala](https://www.cholantours.com/india/kerala-tour-packages): Known for its backwaters and Ayurvedic treatments.
- [Wayanad](https://www.cholantours.com/india/wayanad-tour-packages): A hill district known for its wildlife and plantations.
- [Tamil Nadu](https://www.cholantours.com/india/tamil-nadu-tour-packages): Known for its temples and cultural heritage.
- [Chennai](https://www.cholantours.com/india/chennai-tour-packages): The capital city of Tamil Nadu, known for its music and dance.
- [Kodaikanal](https://www.cholantours.com/india/kodaikanal-tour-packages): A popular hill station in Tamil Nadu.
- [Madurai](https://www.cholantours.com/india/madurai-tour-packages): Known for its ancient temples and rich history.
- [Hyderabad](https://www.cholantours.com/india/hyderabad-tour-packages): Known for its historical sites and cuisine.

### Central India
- [Chhattisgarh](https://www.cholantours.com/india/chhattisgarh-tour-packages): Known for its tribal culture and natural beauty.
- [Bharamdeo](https://www.cholantours.com/india/bharamdeo-tour-packages): Known for its ancient temples.
- [Jagdalpur](https://www.cholantours.com/india/jagdalpur-tour-packages): A city known for its natural beauty and waterfalls.
- [Raipur](https://www.cholantours.com/india/raipur-tour-packages): The capital city of Chhattisgarh.

### Travel Options
- [Luxury Trains](https://www.cholantours.com/luxury-trains): Experience India through luxurious train journeys.
- [Luxury Hotels](https://www.cholantours.com/luxury-hotels): Stay in premium accommodations across various destinations.
- [Customized Holidays](https://www.cholantours.com/customized-holidays): Tailor your travel experience to your preferences.
- [Bus Rental](https://www.cholantours.com/bus-rental): Rent buses for group travel.
- [Car Rental](https://www.cholantours.com/car-rental): Rent cars for personal travel needs.
- [Madurai Car Rental](https://www.cholantours.com/car-rental/madurai): Specific car rental services in Madurai.

## International Destinations
- [Australia](https://www.cholantours.com/international-holidays/australia-tour-packages): Explore the diverse landscapes and cultures of Australia.
- [Bhutan](https://www.cholantours.com/international-holidays/bhutan-tour-packages): Known for its stunning landscapes and Buddhist culture.
- [Indonesia](https://www.cholantours.com/international-holidays/indonesia-tour-packages): Famous for its islands and rich biodiversity.
- [Italy](https://www.cholantours.com/international-holidays/italy-tour-packages): Known for its art, history, and cuisine.
- [South Korea](https://www.cholantours.com/international-holidays/south-korea-tour-packages): A country known for its technology and culture.
- [Spain](https://www.cholantours.com/international-holidays/spain-tour-packages): Famous for its art, architecture, and vibrant culture.

## Travel Themes
- [Adventure](https://www.cholantours.com/blog/adventure/): Explore thrilling activities and destinations.
- [Cultural](https://www.cholantours.com/blog/cultural/): Discover the rich cultural heritage of various regions.
- [Family Travel](https://www.cholantours.com/blog/family-travel/): Family-friendly travel options and packages.
- [Heritage](https://www.cholantours.com/blog/heritage/): Explore historical sites and heritage tours.
- [Wildlife](https://cholantours.com/blog/wildlife/): Experience wildlife safaris and nature tours.
